title: Toast Form Template Values
prompt: Create an internal template application called "Template Studio". Use dark theme and jwt auth. Define a Template model with name, category, and status. Create a templates resource on /api/templates with list and create views. The list view must show name, category, and status columns plus a create action. The create view must contain name, category, and status fields and on success refresh templates plus show a descriptor toast with key templates.created, defaultMessage "Template {name} created", and values.name from form.name.
